name: destiny2-mcp
description: Inspect your Destiny 2 gear, craft builds, and equip loadouts via the Bungie.net API.
long_description: An MCP server for Destiny 2. Reads your characters, inventory, and item rolls from Bungie.net; serves curated build knowledge; finds and imports builds; and equips gear and loadouts. Authenticate once with the `login` tool (opens a browser); tokens are stored locally in `~/.destiny2-mcp`.
